title: QuickString
description: Adds a highly customizable /string plugin used to replace string dupers as they got patched in 1.21.2
body:
Adds a highly customizable /string plugin!

![usingcommand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d034c66f29c76196c3c9fa1353c03126f9fad40.png) (in this screenshot the plugin is configured to only give 2 stacks)
